title: Simulation Result
description: Schema for virtual assay / simulation proxy outputs. See docs/evidence/VIRTUAL_ASSAY_SCOPE.md.

scope.description: List of biological scopes this module models

scores.description: Machine-readable score dictionary. Keys and ranges depend on the module.

uncertainty.description: Module-level uncertainty estimate. 1.0 = completely uncertain (error state). Values > 0.5 are experimental and must not affect selection.

calibration_set.description: Dataset this module was calibrated against, or null.

validated_against.description: Datasets or experiments this module has been validated against.
